_comment: Routing thresholds and per-category model preferences for claude-codex.
_comment_score: classify.sh outputs a score. DELEGATE if >= delegate_threshold AND a category was matched. CLAUDE if <= claude_threshold.
_comment_patterns: Routing signal patterns are hardcoded in scripts/classify.sh — edit them there. This file controls only thresholds, models, reasoning effort, budget scaling, and sandbox levels.

budget_aware._comment: Budget detection: prefers CLAUDE_CONTEXT_WINDOW_USAGE_FRACTION env var (exact); falls back to transcript byte size (proxy). As usage grows, delegate_threshold is lowered so more tasks route to Codex.

context_window_thresholds._comment: Used when CLAUDE_CONTEXT_WINDOW_USAGE_FRACTION env var is available (0.0–1.0).

transcript_size_thresholds._comment: Fallback when env var is not available.
